terms_1_desc: The app must be used responsibly and solely for its intended purposes.
terms_2_desc: You agree not to use the app for any unlawful activities or to infringe on others' rights.
terms_3_desc: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue services at any time, as this is an academic project.
privacy_1_desc: We value your privacy. Your data is stored securely and is not shared with any third parties.
privacy_2_desc: Your passwords are encrypted to ensure maximum security.
privacy_3_desc: The data you provide is used strictly to facilitate task management within your team.

terms_privacy.title: Terms & Privacy Policy
terms_privacy.heading: Terms of Service & Privacy Policy
terms_privacy.body:
Welcome to Team Manager.

Team Manager is a graduation project designed to help teams organize their work, assign tasks, monitor progress, and collaborate efficiently.

Terms of Service

1. The application must be used responsibly and only for its intended purpose.

2. Users must not use the application for illegal activities or in a way that violates the rights of others.

3. Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account credentials.

4. Any misuse of the platform may result in temporary or permanent suspension of access.

5. Since this application is an academic graduation project, some features may change, be improved, or be discontinued without prior notice.

Privacy Policy

1. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.

2. Personal information such as your name and email address is stored securely.

3. Passwords are encrypted and are never stored in plain text.

4. Your information is used only to provide and improve the application's services.

5. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except when required by law.

6. The application may collect basic usage information to improve performance and user experience.

By using Team Manager, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to these Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
